ticket_text: Hi, this is Emily Clarke, I'm locked out of my account and can't remember my password.
route_reasoning: Standard password reset, fully covered by KB.

steps.reasoning: Standard password reset, fully covered by KB.

results.title: How to reset your password
results.content: To reset your password: go to the login page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter the email address on your account and we'll send a reset link valid for 30 minutes. If the email doesn't arrive within 5 minutes, check spam or request a new link. Password resets do not require contacting support.

final_output: Hi there, thanks for reaching out. To reset your password: go to the login page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter the email address on your account and we'll send a reset link valid for 30 minutes. If the email doesn't arrive within 5 minutes, check spam or request a new link. Password resets do not require contacting support. Let us know if you need anything else.
